changes: Dark Arts: Recast time has been reduced from 5 to 3 seconds.

Enhanced Carnal Chill III: Target damage penalty has been increased from 20% to 60%.
Carnal Chill: Duration of the target damage penalty has been reduced from 20 to 6 seconds.

new_content.name: The Feast
new_content.description: A PvP competition featuring season rankings, tiers (bronze to diamond), and special rewards for top combatants.

new_content.name: The Antitower
new_content.description: Dungeon where the accuracy requirement for hitting enemies has been reduced.

new_content.name: The Lost City of Amdapor (Hard)
new_content.description: Dungeon where the accuracy requirement for hitting enemies has been reduced.

new_content.name: Alexander - The Cuff of the Son (Savage)
new_content.description: Raid with adjusted encounter difficulty, specifically regarding Blaster, Brawler, Swindler, and Vortexer.

new_content.name: The Labyrinth of the Ancients
new_content.description: Raid dungeon where orchestrion roll materials now always appear in the final treasure chest.

new_content.name: Syrcus Tower
new_content.description: Raid dungeon where orchestrion roll materials now always appear in the final treasure chest.

new_content.name: The World of Darkness
new_content.description: Raid dungeon where orchestrion roll materials now always appear in the final treasure chest.

new_content.name: Hullbreaker Isle
new_content.description: Instanced dungeon where an issue with the kraken tentacle's Seize was addressed.

new_content.name: Alexander - The Arm of the Son (Savage)
new_content.description: Raid where issues regarding sturm doll detonation and engine oil spawns were addressed.

new_content.name: Battle System
new_content.description: Adjustments to job actions, PvP encounter mechanics, and adrenaline gauge behavior.

new_content.name: Feast Rankings
new_content.description: A new system to track and display player rankings for the Feast on the Lodestone and in-game.

housing.name: Furnishings
housing.description: Special rewards distributed to top combatants for solo and party rankings in the Feast.

housing.name: Orchestrion Roll
housing.description: Materials obtained from raid dungeons (The Labyrinth of the Ancients, Syrcus Tower, The World of Darkness) which will now always appear in the treasure chest.
